name: Supply Shortage
description: A distribution problem has cut off supply for a product category. Suppliers cannot fulfill orders for affected items.
notification_text: Supply Shortage! A distribution disruption has made %s unavailable from suppliers for the next %d days.
resolution_text: The supply shortage has ended. Supplier catalogs are back to normal.

name: Viral Trend
description: A social media post has gone viral featuring one of your items. Demand has skyrocketed!
notification_text: Viral Trend! A social media post about %s has gone viral. Demand is through the roof for the next %d days!
resolution_text: The viral trend has faded. Demand is returning to normal.

name: Health Inspection
description: A mall inspector is evaluating your store. Keep shelves stocked and the store tidy to pass!
notification_text: Health Inspection! An inspector is evaluating your store today.

name: Shoplifting Attempt
description: A shoplifter has been spotted in the store! One item may go missing from your shelves.
notification_text: Shoplifting! A thief stole %s from your shelves!

name: Water Leak
description: A pipe has burst near one of your fixtures. It will be out of commission until repairs are complete.
notification_text: Water Leak! A burst pipe has disabled a fixture for the next %d days.
resolution_text: The water leak has been repaired. All fixtures are back in service.

name: Celebrity Visit
description: A local celebrity is visiting the mall today, drawing huge crowds to your store!
notification_text: Celebrity Visit! A local celebrity is visiting the mall today. Expect 3x the usual foot traffic!
resolution_text: The celebrity has left the mall. Traffic is returning to normal.

name: Power Outage
description: A brief power outage has disrupted mall operations. Customers are leaving early today.
notification_text: Power Outage! A power disruption is reducing customer traffic today. Expect half the usual visitors.
resolution_text: Power has been restored. Mall operations are back to normal.

name: Collector Convention
description: A collector convention in town is driving enthusiasts to the mall. High-value items are in extra demand!
notification_text: Collector Convention! Enthusiasts are flocking to the mall for the next %d days. Rare items are in high demand!
resolution_text: The collector convention has ended. Traffic is returning to normal.
